outlook_paragraph: Continental Resources (CTRA) shows below-average drilling activity with only 14 active sites at decision date, a 20% decline relative to recent trends, driven by a modest addition of 3 newly active pads. With only 40% of operations in the observed segment and a realized price at a 22% discount to WTI, revenue growth is constrained despite stable oil prices near $77.30/bbl. The deterministic forecast of $1.67B reflects limited near-term production momentum and partial exposure to high-activity regions.
